tasks.subject: Task 0: Branch + version bump
Task 1: ssh-config parser in safessh-storage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `safessh_storage::ssh_config` module exposing `SshConfigSnapshot::load(&Paths)` that parses `~/.ssh/config` (or `$SSH_CONFIG_PATH`), excludes wildcard hosts, and caches to `~/.cache/safessh/ssh-config-snapshot.toml` invalidated by source mtime.

**Files:** crates/safessh-storage/Cargo.toml (+ssh2-config 0.3, dev: filetime), crates/safessh-storage/src/ssh_config.rs (new), crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs (export), crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs (+ssh_config_snapshot()), crates/safessh-storage/tests/ssh_config.rs (new, 4 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test ssh_config`

**Acceptance:** parses concrete aliases, excludes wildcards, missing file → empty, snapshot reused on unchanged mtime, // SAFETY-INVARIANT-5 marker on snapshot write.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-storage/src/ssh_config.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/ssh_config.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --test ssh_config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses concrete aliases", "excludes wildcard Host * entries", "missing source returns empty", "snapshot is mtime-cached", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-5 marker on snapshot write"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: --on <target> flag for <project> exec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add an optional `--on <target>` selector parsed out of the external-subcommand argv; resolves to a target by name in `Project::targets`, falling back to `default_target` when absent. Unknown target → exit 2 (Error::Usage).

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs, crates/safessh-cli/tests/exec.rs (+2 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test exec`

**Acceptance:** --on db routes to db target, no --on uses default_target, unknown target exits 2 with `safessh: usage error: no such target: <name>`, --on placement anywhere in argv works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/exec.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test exec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--on resolves named target", "absent --on uses default_target", "unknown target exits 2", "--on works anywhere in argv"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: project target add/list/remove subcommands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New `safessh project target` subcommand group: add (alias OR inline), list (one-per-line with [default] marker), remove (refuses removing default_target).

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs (+TargetCmd enum), crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/project.rs (target_run), crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs (dispatch already in place via ProjectCmd::Target), crates/safessh-cli/tests/project_target.rs (new, 5 tests), crates/safessh-cli/tests/common/mod.rs (hoisted shared TestEnv).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test project_target`

**Acceptance:** alias add appends, inline add appends, list shows [default] marker, remove default refused (exit 1), remove unknown errors (exit 1), duplicate name rejected (exit 2).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/project.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/project_target.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/common/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test project_target", "acceptanceCriteria": ["target add alias appends", "target add inline requires host+user", "list marks default", "remove default refused", "remove unknown errors", "duplicate name rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: project add --import-ssh-config <alias>
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `project add` flag that imports target details from `~/.ssh/config` snapshot. Conflicts with --alias/--host/--user (clap-level). Materializes Inline target with snapshotted host/user/port/identity_file/proxy_jump.

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs, crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/project.rs, crates/safessh-cli/tests/project_import.rs (new, 3 tests), crates/safessh-cli/tests/common/mod.rs (+write_ssh_config/read_project), crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs (+ProjectStore::paths_ref).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test project_import`

**Acceptance:** import creates inline target with alias values, unknown alias → exit 1 with 'no ssh-config alias: <name>', conflicts with --alias exits 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/project.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/project_import.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/common/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test project_import", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import creates inline target", "unknown alias exits 1", "conflict with --alias exits 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Bootstrap safessh-tui crate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New `safessh-tui` crate with App skeleton, EventStream (crossterm + tokio ticker + fs-channel relay), terminal enter/leave via Drop guard, q/Ctrl-C/Esc quit. Renders header+footer with placeholder body.

**Files:** Cargo.toml (workspace member + deps), crates/safessh-tui/Cargo.toml (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/{lib.rs,app.rs,event.rs,theme.rs,widgets.rs,screens/mod.rs} (all new), crates/safessh-tui/tests/routing.rs (new, 3 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo build --package safessh-tui && cargo test --package safessh-tui --test routing`

**Acceptance:** crate builds clean, q/Ctrl-C/Esc → AppAction::Quit, header text 'safessh' visible in TestBackend, terminal teardown in Drop.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-tui/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-tui/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/event.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/theme.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/widgets.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/routing.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test routing", "acceptanceCriteria": ["crate builds", "q/Ctrl-C/Esc quit", "header rendered", "terminal teardown via Drop"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Notify-based filesystem watcher
tasks.description:
**Goal:** notify-debouncer-mini watcher (200ms debounce) on pending/, projects/, and audit.log's parent dir; converts to FsEvent::ApprovalsChanged/ProjectsChanged/AuditAppended. Started inside App::run; guard tears down with TUI.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/watcher.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/lib.rs (export), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (start + plumb fs_tx), crates/safessh-tui/tests/watcher.rs (new, 3 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test watcher`

**Acceptance:** pending file write → ApprovalsChanged within 800ms, project write → ProjectsChanged, audit append → AuditAppended, debouncer collapses bursts, // SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker noting that fs events are signals to re-read via the storage API.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/watcher.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/watcher.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test watcher", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pending write triggers ApprovalsChanged", "project write triggers ProjectsChanged", "audit append triggers AuditAppended", "bursts debounced", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Projects screen (read-only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Projects screen with sorted list (left) + detail pane (right) showing targets and policy. Up/Down/j/k navigate. Reloads on FsEvent::ProjectsChanged. Empty state instructs user to run project add.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/projects.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs (export), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (route + projects field + FS arm), crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_snapshot.rs (new, 2 insta snapshots), crates/safessh-tui/src/snapshots/ (committed).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test projects_snapshot && cargo insta accept --workspace`

**Acceptance:** empty state message, list sorted, detail shows targets+policy, ProjectsChanged triggers reload, snapshots committed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/projects.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_snapshot.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test projects_snapshot", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty state message", "sorted list", "detail pane shows targets+policy", "reload on FsEvent", "insta snapshots committed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Approvals screen with 5-action picker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pending approvals queue with token/project/binary/categories/age columns. Enter opens centered picker (Once/Timed/Always/Deny/Block); selection writes through TimedStore/AlwaysStore/BlockedStore; pending file removed via PendingStore::take. Reloads on FsEvent::ApprovalsChanged.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/approvals.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs (export), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (route + FS arm), crates/safessh-tui/tests/approvals_snapshot.rs (new, 2 snapshots), crates/safessh-tui/tests/approvals_actions.rs (new, 4 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test approvals_snapshot && cargo test --package safessh-tui --test approvals_actions`

**Acceptance:** empty state, populated table snapshot, Once removes pending, Always→AlwaysStore, Timed(15)→TimedStore, Block→BlockedStore, // SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker on the action-apply block.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/approvals.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/approvals_snapshot.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/approvals_actions.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test approvals_actions", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty state", "populated table", "Once removes pending", "Always writes AlwaysStore", "Timed writes TimedStore", "Block writes BlockedStore", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Rules screen (timed/always/blocked)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three-tab view of persistent rules per project. Project selector with </>/←→. 1/2/3 switch tabs. d deletes selected rule via store::remove. Adds TimedStore::remove (mirror of AlwaysStore::remove).

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/rules.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs (export), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (route), crates/safessh-tui/tests/rules_snapshot.rs (new, 3 snapshots), crates/safessh-tui/tests/rules_actions.rs (new, 3 tests), crates/safessh-storage/src/approvals.rs (+TimedStore::remove).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test rules_snapshot && cargo test --package safessh-tui --test rules_actions`

**Acceptance:** project cycling, three tabs, per-tab empty state, delete removes from correct store, TimedStore::remove implemented + tested, // SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker on delete path.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/rules.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/rules_snapshot.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/rules_actions.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/approvals.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test rules_actions", "acceptanceCriteria": ["project cycling", "3 tabs", "per-tab empty state", "delete from correct store", "TimedStore::remove added", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-12 marker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Audit screen (tail + filters)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live tail of audit.log (last 200 events). /p /t /g set project/type/grep filters. g/G top/bottom (G resumes auto-scroll). FsEvent::AuditAppended reads only the new tail (offset-tracked).

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/audit.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs (export), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (route + FS arm), crates/safessh-tui/tests/audit_snapshot.rs (new, 2 snapshots), crates/safessh-tui/tests/audit_filters.rs (new, 3 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test audit_snapshot && cargo test --package safessh-tui --test audit_filters`

**Acceptance:** empty state, populated tail snapshot, project/type/grep filters work, append_tail uses offset (no full re-read), rotation handled (new_len < offset → full_reload), G resumes auto-scroll.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/audit.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/audit_snapshot.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/audit_filters.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test audit_filters", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty state", "tail rendered", "3 filter types work", "offset-based append_tail", "rotation handled", "G resumes auto-scroll"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Screen routing + help overlay
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tab/Shift-Tab cycle Projects→Approvals→Rules→Audit. ? toggles help overlay; overlay swallows all input except Esc/?. help_text() exported for docs/tui.md.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/help.rs (new), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (cycle + overlay), crates/safessh-tui/src/lib.rs (re-export), crates/safessh-tui/tests/routing.rs (+3 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test routing`

**Acceptance:** Tab cycles forward, Shift-Tab cycles back, ? opens/Esc closes overlay, overlay swallows other keys, help_text() public.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/help.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/routing.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test routing", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tab cycles forward", "Shift-Tab cycles back", "? toggles overlay", "overlay swallows keys", "help_text exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Wire `safessh tui` CLI subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace v0.1 placeholder in main.rs with `safessh_tui::run(paths).await`. Refuse non-TTY stdin with exit 1.

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/Cargo.toml (+safessh-tui dep), crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs (Tui arm).

**Verify:** `cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace` then manual `cargo run --bin safessh -- tui` opens TUI; non-TTY exits 1.

**Acceptance:** safessh tui opens TUI, q quits cleanly, non-TTY exits 1 with `safessh: error: tui requires a TTY`, all v0.1 tests still pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["safessh tui opens TUI", "q quits", "non-TTY exits 1", "all existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: ssh-config import inside projects screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `i` opens import dialog inside projects screen: multi-select aliases (Space toggles), Enter creates one project per checked entry (skipping existing names), Esc cancels. Reuses Task 1 snapshot loader.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/projects.rs (+ImportDialog state + open/close/move/toggle/commit), crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (branch on import-open), crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_import.rs (new, 4 tests), crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_snapshot.rs (+1 dialog snapshot).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test projects_import`

**Acceptance:** dialog loads aliases, Space toggles, Enter creates only checked, existing-name aliases skipped, list reloads after commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/projects.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_import.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/projects_snapshot.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test projects_import", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dialog loads aliases", "Space toggles", "Enter creates checked", "existing names skipped", "reload after commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: External-edit toast
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Show transient `config changed externally — reloaded` toast on FS events; auto-clears after ~3s; second toast replaces first (no stacking). Required by spec §7.3.

**Files:** crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs (toast state + show/clear + tick hook), crates/safessh-tui/src/widgets.rs (toast widget), crates/safessh-tui/tests/toast.rs (new, 2 tests).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-tui --test toast`

**Acceptance:** show_toast → toast.is_some(), expires_at past now → cleared on tick, second show replaces first.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/app.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/widgets.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/toast.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test toast", "acceptanceCriteria": ["show_toast sets state", "tick clears expired", "second toast replaces first"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: README/CHANGELOG/cli-reference/skill updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface v0.2 changes: README features table flips, CHANGELOG [0.2.0] populated, cli-reference adds new flags+subcommands, skill markdown documents --on and notes safessh tui (regenerate insta snapshots).

tasks.subject: Task 19: v0.2.0 release rehearsal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run release-checklist sequence: merge develop→main, tag v0.2.0-rc.1, verify cargo-dist pipeline + clean-machine smoke (macOS arm64 + Linux x86_64), promote to v0.2.0, post-release CHANGELOG bookkeeping.

**Files:** docs/RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md (version bump + v0.2 specifics).

**Verify:** Manual rehearsal documented in PR body; tags v0.2.0-rc.1 and v0.2.0 reachable from main.

**Acceptance:** rc.1 tag → 4 binaries + Homebrew formula + curl installer; macOS+Linux smoke (`safessh tui` opens, q quits); v0.2.0 promoted; `chore: release v0.2.0` lands with date set and empty [Unreleased] re-added.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["v0.2.0-rc.1 pipeline produces 4 binaries", "macOS arm64 smoke passes", "Linux x86_64 smoke passes", "v0.2.0 tag promoted", "chore: release v0.2.0 commit lands"]}
```
